role: This file is the keystone structural-primitive module that defines the five named React shells (Card, Rail, Stage, Composer, RhmPanel) composing the Studio review surface and wires them to the shared AppContext controllers.
capabilities: Render grouped corpus gallery as selectable Cards
Indicate a reviewed mockup locus without executing it
Stage a mockup in a sandboxed same-origin iframe
Toggle staged mockup between desktop and phone frames
Capture element-level deixis from inside the staged iframe
Derive a meaningful sub-locus for un-registered clicked elements
Provide visual outline feedback for the selected element
Reset locus to the whole mockup via a whole-screen control
Compose and post addressed comments to the shared annotation store
Mint build-intents from addressed change requests
Run plan-mode generate on the open mockup and show proposed edits
Display the annotation thread at the current locus
Show address-help metadata for the current locus
Mount the real RhmChat organ grounded at the studio locus
Offer a one-click primed read question to the RHM
substance_why: It implements all five named primitives with real data binding, event handlers, iframe deixis bridge, composer actions, generate result display, and live RhmChat integration.
interactions_present: Iframe load + polling → attachDeixis click delegate
Click inside iframe → setReviewMockup with element/ancestor/base address
Whole-screen button → reset locus to base mockup address
Composer textarea onChange → local text state
Generate button → mockupGenerate for open mockup
RhmPanel read button → sendChat with primed question
interactions_missing: No loading/skeleton state for the corpus list or iframe load
No error or retry UI for iframe load failures
No feedback or error state for comment / intent submission
No ability to edit, delete, or resolve annotations
No search, filter, or sort in the Rail gallery
No zoom, reload, or fullscreen controls for the Stage
No explicit handling when address-help returns empty or fails
No keyboard shortcuts or accessible focus management
No dispatch/approve action for generated proposals in this surface
No history or back-navigation between previously indicated loci
performance_risks: Stage polls attachDeixis every 120 ms for up to ~2.4 s per mockup open, causing repeated cross-boundary contentDocument access and listener checks
Composer re-renders the full annotation thread on every keystroke because text state lives in the same component
Iframe click delegate uses capturing phase and reads innerText/outerHTML on every click; bounded slices help but still runs synchronously
Rail rebuilds the grouped corpus object on every render
reuse_why: Keep the five primitive contracts and their wired interactions as the studio skeleton, but rebuild the implementation to remove polling, split responsibilities, and replace inline styling with token-driven layout.
decomposition_hints: Split Card into its own component file
Split Rail (gallery grouping + empty states) into its own file
Extract Stage deixis bridge (message listener, click delegate, slug helper) into a custom hook or bridge module
Split Composer into comment composer, intent composer, generate result panel, and thread display
Split RhmPanel into address-help panel, primed-question launcher, and RhmChat wrapper
Move device-frame layout and whole-screen reset into Stage sub-components
